$comment: Baseline pinned to the microsoft/vcpkg commit that ships the cpp-client-telemetry 3.10.173.1 port (PR #52568) for POSIX 1DS telemetry. ONNX Runtime's heavy dependencies are pinned via overlay-ports/overrides (see cmake/vcpkg.json), so this only floats benign minor versions; verified with 'vcpkg install --dry-run'.
